tools.title: volcengine/OpenViking
tools.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

china.title: Agent 记忆系统在 eBay 支付风控团队的探索与实践｜QCon北京
AI 架构中的 “油水难融” 时刻
BeingBeyond正式发布U1，全球首款Real DexUMI
china.description: 36氪获悉，BeingBeyond正式推出U1，全球首款Real DexUMI。U1首次在同一系统中打通灵巧手数据采集与机器人末端执行器，遵循末端本体一致性的设计原则，为灵巧操作带来高质量、且易规模化的数据范式。

china.title: 36氪首发 | 高能粒子应用核心部件公司完成超亿元融资，加速高端仪器、半导体领域国产替代
china.description:
作者 | 张子怡
编辑 | 袁斯来
36氪获悉，聚焦高能粒子应用系统核心部件的苏州博思得电气有限公司（以下简称“博思得”）近日宣布完成超亿元C轮融资。本轮融资由上海瑞力领投，交银资本、元璟资本跟投。募集资金将主要用于高端产品研发升级及全球化市场布局。
高压发生器、X光射线源是医疗影像、工业无损检测、半导体及高端仪器的核心部件，属于多学科交叉的复杂工程，对产品的性能、一致性、可靠性要求较高，是多众重

china.title: 当黄仁勋和吴泳铭喊出同一个英文单词
china.description:
文｜邱晓芬
编辑｜苏建勋
美国旧金山当地时间3月16日，英伟达GTC 2026大会正式开幕。在英伟达创始人兼CEO黄仁勋两个小时慷慨激昂的主题演讲中，贯穿的一个关键词是——Token。

△ 黄仁勋，图源：发布会截图 
无独有偶，在GTC 2026的前一天，阿里巴巴宣布成立Token事业群——这是地位与淘天电商、阿里云一般的核心独立事业群。这个新事业群里，阿里也明确了“创造Token、输送Toke

china.title: 想帮大家做「一人公司」，茉莉语境融资百万美元
china.description:
凌晨三点，自媒体博主阿鱼的第32个小红书账号自动发布了一条笔记：“救命！这个方法我要是早知道至少少加200小时班”。此刻她正在熟睡，而在云端，36只龙虾正在执行一套作战计划：4只幕后龙虾负责抓取热点、拆解爆款、审核违禁词，另外32只前台龙虾各自扮演着“工作3年的互联网运营妹子”“靠副业还清8万房贷的上班族”“8年经验的产品老鸟”等不同人格，在32个垂直账号上同时发声。
三个月前，阿鱼还只是一个月入

china.title: 36氪首发｜专注智能运动眼镜，「光粒科技」完成近亿元Pre-B轮融资
china.description:
36氪获悉，智能运动眼镜品牌「光粒科技」已完成近亿元Pre-B轮融资，本轮由杭州高新金投投资。本轮资金将主要用于团队建设、技术研发以及全球市场的营销销售拓展。 
「光粒科技」成立于2017年，专注于AR智能眼镜及运动科学算法的研发。自2023年起，公司聚焦智能运动眼镜赛道，通过全息树脂光波导技术将运动数据实时呈现在用户眼前，解决运动场景下“数据不可见”的痛点。
目前，光粒已从早期单一的智能泳镜产品

Abstract: AI-related incidents are becoming increasingly frequent and severe, ranging from safety failures to misuse by malicious actors. In such complex situations, identifying which elements caused an adverse outcome, the problem of cause selection, is a crit
papers.author: Maria Victoria Carro, David Lagnado

papers.title: A Dual-Path Generative Framework for Zero-Day Fraud Detection in Banking Systems
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13237v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: High-frequency banking environments face a critical trade-off between low-latency fraud detection and the regulatory explainability demanded by GDPR. Traditional rule-based and discriminative models struggle with "zero-day" attacks due to extreme clas
papers.author: Nasim Abdirahman Ismail, Enis Karaarslan

papers.title: Benchmarking Zero-Shot Reasoning Approaches for Error Detection in Solidity Smart Contracts
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13239v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Smart contracts play a central role in blockchain systems by encoding financial and operational logic. Still, their susceptibility to subtle security flaws poses significant risks of financial loss and erosion of trust. LLMs create new opportunities f
papers.author: Eduardo Sardenberg, Antonio Jos\'e Grandson Busson, Daniel de Sousa Moraes, S\'ergio Colcher

papers.title: Think First, Diffuse Fast: Improving Diffusion Language Model Reasoning via Autoregressive Plan Conditioning
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13243v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Diffusion large language models (dLLMs) generate text via iterative denoising but consistently underperform on multi-step reasoning. We hypothesize this gap stems from a coordination problem: AR models build coherence token-by-token, while diffusion m
papers.author: Earl J St Sauver

papers.title: Automating Document Intelligence in Statutory City Planning
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13245v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: UK planning authorities face a legislative conflict between the Planning Act, which mandates public access to application documents, and the Data Protection Act, which requires protection of personal information. This situation creates a manually inte
papers.author: Lars Malmqvist, Robin Barber

papers.title: Multi-Axis Trust Modeling for Interpretable Account Hijacking Detection
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13246v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: This paper proposes a Hadith-inspired multi-axis trust modeling framework, motivated by a structurally analogous problem in classical Hadith scholarship: assessing the trustworthiness of information sources using interpretable, multidimensional criter
papers.author: Mohammad AL-Smadi

papers.title: ILION: Deterministic Pre-Execution Safety Gates for Agentic AI Systems
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13247v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: The proliferation of autonomous AI agents capable of executing real-world actions - filesystem operations, API calls, database modifications, financial transactions - introduces a class of safety risk not addressed by existing content-moderation infra
papers.author: Florin Adrian Chitan

papers.title: ManiBench: A Benchmark for Testing Visual-Logic Drift and Syntactic Hallucinations in Manim Code Generation
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13251v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Traditional benchmarks like HumanEval and MBPP test logic and syntax effectively, but fail when code must produce dynamic, pedagogical visuals. We introduce ManiBench, a specialized benchmark evaluating LLM performance in generating Manim CE code, whe
papers.author: Nabin Oli

papers.title: When Alpha Breaks: Two-Level Uncertainty for Safe Deployment of Cross-Sectional Stock Rankers
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13252v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Cross-sectional ranking models are often deployed as if point predictions were sufficient: the model outputs scores and the portfolio follows the induced ordering. Under non-stationarity, rankers can fail during regime shifts. In the AI Stock Forecast
papers.author: Ursina Sanderink

papers.title: Distilling Deep Reinforcement Learning into Interpretable Fuzzy Rules: An Explainable AI Framework
papers.description:
arXiv:2603.13257v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agents achieve remarkable performance in continuous control but remain opaque, hindering deployment in safety-critical domains. Existing explainability methods either provide only local insights (SHAP, LIME) or employ
papers.author: Sanup S. Araballi, Simon Khan, Chilukuri K. Mohan
